ActorFrame.UnderCommand: %function() if Screen():GetChild('PlayerP1') then Screen():GetChild('PlayerP1'):zoom(0) end if Screen():GetChild('PlayerP2') then Screen():GetChild('PlayerP2'):zoom(0) end if Screen():GetChild('LifeP1') then Screen():GetChild('LifeP1'):zoom(0) end if Screen():GetChild('LifeP2') then Screen():GetChild('LifeP2'):zoom(0) end Screen():GetChild('SongForeground'):zoom(0) end

children.Layer: <Tip File="Tip" Command="queuecommand,Loop" ClearedMessageCommand="%function(self) xTip = self:GetX() if warp < 12 and goal == 0 and not IsFinalStage() then _G['lvlCount'..dark][world] = _G['lvlCount'..dark][world] + 1 end if goal ~= 0 then warp = goal end self:queuemessage('X') self:queuecommand('Pass1') self:linear(.5) self:zoom(3) self:addy(223) self:sleep(.5) self:queuecommand('Pass2') self:queuecommand('Finished') end" FailedMessageCommand="%function(self) xTip = self:GetX() self:queuemessage('X') self:queuecommand('Fail1') self:linear(.5) self:zoom(3) self:addy(223) self:sleep(.5) self:queuecommand('Fail2') self:queuecommand('Finished') end" />

Layer.ScoreCommand: %function(self) local score = Screen():GetChild('ScoreP1'):GetChild('ScoreDisplayPercentage Percent'):GetChild('PercentP1'):GetText() score = string.gsub(score,'%%','') self:settext(score) self:sleep(.03) self:queuecommand('Score') end

%function(self) local score = Screen():GetChild('ScoreP2'):GetChild('ScoreDisplayPercentage Percent'):GetChild('PercentP2'):GetText() score = string.gsub(score,'%%','') self:settext(score) self:sleep(.03) self:queuecommand('Score') end

Layer.OnCommand: %function(self) if GAMESTATE:PlayerUsingBothSides() then self:y(-45) if GAMESTATE:IsPlayerEnabled(PLAYER_2) then self:x(-275) else self:x(275) end; end; end

ActorFrame.LoopCommand: %function(self) lifeState = lifeState + 1; if lifeState > 5 then lifeState = 0 end for i,v in ipairs(lifeNormal) do if ModCustom.LifeBar[i] ~= 2 then v:setstate(lifeState) end end for i,v in ipairs(lifeHot) do if ModCustom.LifeBar[i] ~= 2 then v:setstate(lifeState) end end self:sleep(.06) self:queuecommand('Loop') end
